testcase.name: test_subscribe_returns_checkout_url
test_platform_config

failure.message: AssertionError: {'min_deposit_amount': 50.0, 'platform_fee_percent': 0.08, 'subscription_price_mxn': 39.0, 'subscription_trial_days': 30, ...} assert 39.0 == 49.99 + where 39.0 = float(39.0) + where 39.0 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfdce55ca55c0>('subscription_price_mxn', 0) + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfdce55ca55c0> = {'min_deposit_amount': 50.0, 'platform_fee_percent': 0.08, 'subscription_price_mxn': 39.0, 'subscription_trial_days': 30, ...}.get

testcase.failure: E AssertionError: {'min_deposit_amount': 50.0, 'platform_fee_percent': 0.08, 'subscription_price_mxn': 39.0, 'subscription_trial_days': 30, ...} assert 39.0 == 49.99 + where 39.0 = float(39.0) + where 39.0 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfdce55ca55c0>('subscription_price_mxn', 0) + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfdce55ca55c0> = {'min_deposit_amount': 50.0, 'platform_fee_percent': 0.08, 'subscription_price_mxn': 39.0, 'subscription_trial_days': 30, ...}.get

testcase.name: test_featured_excludes_none

failure.message: AssertionError: Biz with subscription_status='none' (TEST_none_ead13741) appeared in /featured. Per VISIBLE_BUSINESS_FILTER spec, only active/trialing should be visible. assert 'TEST_none_ead13741' not in ['TEST_none_ead13741', 'fbb3d0e3-37f2-417b-8cfa-b7fbf24f1ee0', '5ecc65fc-3a57-4476-94ca-c2e2c026a9d0', '8d4d30f9-667f-49b6-9924-8a6732eb3029', '1bfd49d3-472f-49d6-bc18-78de5c56645b', '829d2b88-5609-4fe3-9325-812b41e282b5']

testcase.failure: E AssertionError: Biz with subscription_status='none' (TEST_none_ead13741) appeared in /featured. Per VISIBLE_BUSINESS_FILTER spec, only active/trialing should be visible. assert 'TEST_none_ead13741' not in ['TEST_none_ead13741', 'fbb3d0e3-37f2-417b-8cfa-b7fbf24f1ee0', '5ecc65fc-3a57-4476-94ca-c2e2c026a9d0', '8d4d30f9-667f-49b6-9924-8a6732eb3029', '1bfd49d3-472f-49d6-bc18-78de5c56645b', '829d2b88-5609-4fe3-9325-812b41e282b5']

testcase.name: test_search_excludes_none

failure.message: AssertionError: Biz with status='none' (TEST_none_ead13741) appeared in search. Should be hidden per VISIBLE_BUSINESS_FILTER. assert 'TEST_none_ead13741' not in ['TEST_none_ead13741', 'fbb3d0e3-37f2-417b-8cfa-b7fbf24f1ee0', '5ecc65fc-3a57-4476-94ca-c2e2c026a9d0', '8d4d30f9-667f-49b6-9924-8a6732eb3029', '1bfd49d3-472f-49d6-bc18-78de5c56645b', '829d2b88-5609-4fe3-9325-812b41e282b5']

testcase.failure: E AssertionError: Biz with status='none' (TEST_none_ead13741) appeared in search. Should be hidden per VISIBLE_BUSINESS_FILTER. assert 'TEST_none_ead13741' not in ['TEST_none_ead13741', 'fbb3d0e3-37f2-417b-8cfa-b7fbf24f1ee0', '5ecc65fc-3a57-4476-94ca-c2e2c026a9d0', '8d4d30f9-667f-49b6-9924-8a6732eb3029', '1bfd49d3-472f-49d6-bc18-78de5c56645b', '829d2b88-5609-4fe3-9325-812b41e282b5']
